summary: Phase 10 testing complete: Role-based experience for Farmer, Policymaker, and Scientist fully functional. Backend: 5/5 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 13 user stories (US-33 to US-43) passed (100%).
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/login (farmer@test.in) - successful authentication
Backend: GET /api/farmer/advisory?state_code=GJ - returns 6 cards (weather/rain/irrigate/sowing/heat/pest), AI plain-language advice_text, 3 provenance sources
Backend: GET /api/farmer/advisory?state_code=INVALID - correctly returns 404
Backend: GET /api/policymaker/brief?state_code=MH - returns 6 risk cards, AI executive brief_text, national_summary, top_priority_states, 4 provenance sources
Backend: GET /api/policymaker/brief?state_code=INVALID - correctly returns 404
Frontend US-33: Login as FARMER lands on /app showing FarmerHome (data-testid='farmer-home') with 6 cards visible
Frontend US-34: Farmer AI advisory text in plain language (no SPI, ERA5, LPA, anomalies)
Frontend US-35: Farmer sidebar shows ONLY 3 items (Farmer Console, Agriculture, AI Climate Advisor) - nav-scientist-lab ABSENT
Frontend US-36: Farmer attempting /app/lab redirected to /app (RoleGate working)
Frontend US-36: Farmer attempting /app/scenarios redirected to /app (RoleGate working)
Frontend US-37: Login as POLICYMAKER lands on PolicymakerHome (data-testid='policymaker-home') with national strip + 6 risk cards
Frontend US-38: Policymaker AI Executive Brief shows structured policy text (HEADLINE, KEY RISK, AFFECTED SECTORS, RECOMMENDED ACTIONS, DATA CONFIDENCE)
Frontend US-39: Policymaker sidebar excludes Scientist Lab (nav-scientist-lab absent), includes 10 modules (Monsoon/Extremes/Drought/Scenarios/Sectors/Advisor)
Frontend US-40: Policymaker attempting /app/lab redirected to /app (RoleGate working)
Frontend US-41: Login as SCIENTIST lands on Mission Control Dashboard (not FarmerHome/PolicymakerHome)
Frontend US-42: Scientist sidebar shows all 11 modules including Scientist Lab (nav-scientist-lab present)
Frontend US-42: Scientist can access /app/lab (not redirected)
Frontend US-43: Header role badge shows 'FARMER' for farmer user
Frontend US-43: Header role badge shows 'POLICYMAKER' for policymaker user
Frontend US-43: Header role badge shows 'SCIENTIST' for scientist user

phase10_backend_farmer_advisory.details: GET /api/farmer/advisory?state_code=GJ returns 6 cards with correct structure (icon, title, big, sub, status), AI-generated advice_text in plain language, and 3 provenance sources (Open-Meteo, Open-Meteo ERA5, NASA POWER). Response time: ~6 seconds (includes LLM generation).

phase10_backend_policymaker_brief.details: GET /api/policymaker/brief?state_code=MH returns 6 risk cards with correct structure (label, big, sub, severity), AI-generated brief_text with policy-grade structure, national_summary with monsoon/drought/warnings data, top_priority_states array, and 4 provenance sources. Response time: ~14 seconds (includes LLM generation).

phase10_backend_error_handling.details: Both farmer advisory and policymaker brief endpoints correctly return 404 for invalid state codes (tested with state_code=INVALID).

phase10_frontend_farmer_ux.details: Farmer role provides simplified UX: FarmerHome component with 6 action-oriented cards (weather, rain, irrigate, sowing, heat stress, pest risk), AI advisory in plain language with emojis and simple sentences (no technical terms like SPI/ERA5/LPA), sidebar limited to 3 items only (Farmer Console, Agriculture, AI Climate Advisor), and RoleGate prevents access to /app/lab and /app/scenarios.

phase10_frontend_policymaker_ux.details: Policymaker role provides executive UX: PolicymakerHome with national summary strip (5 cards showing monsoon departure, states in drought, active warnings, top priority states), AI Executive Brief with structured policy text (HEADLINE, KEY RISK, AFFECTED SECTORS, RECOMMENDED ACTIONS, DATA CONFIDENCE), 6 risk indicators, sidebar with 10 modules (excludes Scientist Lab), and RoleGate prevents access to /app/lab.

phase10_frontend_scientist_ux.details: Scientist role provides full Mission Control UX: Dashboard with heatmap and all climate modules, sidebar with all 11 items including Scientist Lab, full access to all routes including /app/lab (no RoleGate restrictions).

phase10_frontend_role_badges.details: Header displays correct role badge for each user type: 'FARMER' for farmer@test.in, 'POLICYMAKER' for policymaker@test.in, 'SCIENTIST' for scientist@test.in. Badges are styled with font-mono, uppercase, and role-specific colors.

phase10_frontend_rolegate.details: RoleGate component correctly restricts access based on role: Farmer cannot access /app/lab or /app/scenarios (redirected to /app), Policymaker cannot access /app/lab (redirected to /app), Scientist has full access to all routes including /app/lab.

phase10_ai_content_quality.details: AI-generated content is appropriate for each role: Farmer advisory uses simple language with emojis and actionable advice (e.g., 'Please water your crops today'), Policymaker brief uses executive register with structured sections and policy-relevant recommendations (e.g., 'Activate Delhi Disaster Management Authority water-rationing protocol'). Both are grounded in real fetched data.

performance_notes: Farmer advisory endpoint responds in ~6 seconds (includes LLM generation for advice_text)
Policymaker brief endpoint responds in ~14 seconds (includes LLM generation for brief_text)
Frontend requires 6-15 second wait for data to fully load due to backend LLM processing
Login and authentication for all three roles works correctly
screenshots: .screenshots/phase10_farmer_home.png - Shows FarmerHome with 6 cards and plain-language AI advisory
.screenshots/phase10_policymaker_home.png - Shows PolicymakerHome with national strip, executive brief, and risk cards
.screenshots/phase10_scientist_home.png - Shows Mission Control Dashboard with heatmap and full sidebar
